arts.ttl: FPL notes: Johnson scores again, Chelsea suspensions + Konsa injury
arts.sum: A summary of Sunday’s Gameweek 7 games The post FPL notes: Johnson scores again, Chelsea suspensions + Konsa injury appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Nicolas Jackson Could be Punished After Brawl Breaks Out in Chelsea 1-1 Forest
arts.sum: Chelsea's Nicolas Jackson could face punishment for putting his hand in the face of Nottingham Forest defender Morato during their 1-1 draw.

arts.ttl: Anthony Elanga reacts as Neco Williams takes aim at Levi Colwill with cheeky Instagram post
Chelsea to hold transfer meeting for unwanted duo
arts.sum: Chelsea will reportedly hold a transfer meeting in December to discuss the sales of Ben Chilwell and Carney Chukwuemeka . The west London club are looking to sell Chilwell and Chukwuemeka during the January transfer window and a meeting to discuss their futures has been scheduled for December, according to CaughtOffside .

arts.ttl: Footage shows what Cole Palmer did during bust-up in Chelsea draw
arts.sum: Perhaps this decision was wise from Palmer particularly, as it remains to be seen if any punishments will be dished out retrospectively to players involved in the incident. However, in the closing stages, both sets of players were involved in a coming together by the touchline after Forest defender Neco Williams appeared to push Marc Cucurella into Enzo Maresca .

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea send scout to watch French midfielder who models his game on N'Golo Kante
‘Don’t see a place’: Jason Cundy thinks Chelsea now need to loan out ‘amazing’ player
arts.sum: Things have been going pretty well under Enzo Maresca at Chelsea so far. The new manager has been pretty consistent with his team selection, as...

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo urges referees to be more understanding during 'very emotional' games as James Ward-Prowse sees red in 'crazy' Chelsea clash with Forest boss also booked
arts.sum: Ward-Prowse was one of nine players to be booked by referee Chris Kavanagh during the game, while Espirito Santo was also shown a yellow during the second half.

arts.ttl: Chris Wood scored the goal but 44-touch player was Nottingham Forest’s hero vs Chelsea - opinion
Chelsea missing at least two players for Premier League showdown with Liverpool
arts.sum: Chelsea will be missing at least two players through suspension when they square off against Liverpool in the Premier League on October 20.
